policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-appcs-02 - Disallow local authentication'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+App+Configuration#IncidentremediationAppConfiguration-drcp-appcs-02 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP App Configuration Deny local authentication methods
policyDefinition.description: This policy prevents App Configuration instances from using local authentication methods. Disabling local authentication methods improves security by ensuring that App Configuration stores require Microsoft Entra identities exclusively for authentication.

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
